item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p09","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses opening another gift-handling point, recognizes the repeated pattern of prior queue/window splits, moves the diagnosis upstream to fragmented routing and intake/capacity governance, and proposes unified-entry structural redesign rather than another local channel."}
